subcodes.first_line: O sapling of the rose-garden of God's love! The spiritual melody that streamed forth from the throat of divine love reached the ear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بوستان محبت الله نغمه روحانی که از حنجر محبت الله صادر شده بود بگوش
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @laws of marriage and dowry
